# Quartz Solutions

> Enterprise software development, quality assurance, cybersecurity,
> and business automation. Built to outlast the trend cycle.
> Est. 2013 — rebranded Quartz Solutions in 2026.

Quartz Solutions designs, builds, secures and operates the
line-of-business systems behind retail, finance, logistics,
healthcare, education and government clients worldwide
(Europe, North Africa, the Gulf, SE Asia, and the Americas).

## Services
- [Custom Software Development](https://quartz-solutions.net/en/services/development) — line-of-business platforms, internal tools, APIs, integrations.
- [Web Development](https://quartz-solutions.net/en/services/web-development) — modern, accessible, SEO-first marketing and product web.
- [Mobile Apps](https://quartz-solutions.net/en/services/mobile-apps) — native and cross-platform apps for iOS/Android.
- [Quality Assurance](https://quartz-solutions.net/en/services/qa) — E2E, load, regression, CI-integrated testing.
- [Cybersecurity](https://quartz-solutions.net/en/services/cybersecurity) — pentest, SOC augmentation, human-risk training.
- [Business Automation](https://quartz-solutions.net/en/services/automation) — workflow engines, RPA, ops tooling.

## Products
- [Quartz POS](https://bo.quartz-solutions.net) — POS · e-commerce · CRM, one stack for store + site + customer.
- [Quartz Cyber](https://cyber.quartz-solutions.net) — human-risk simulation platform (phishing, vishing, calendar, invoice).

## Industries
- [Retail POS](https://quartz-solutions.net/en/industries/retail-pos)
- [Healthcare](https://quartz-solutions.net/en/industries/healthcare)
- [Financial Services](https://quartz-solutions.net/en/industries/financial-services)
- [Government](https://quartz-solutions.net/en/industries/government)
- [Education](https://quartz-solutions.net/en/industries/education)
- [All industries](https://quartz-solutions.net/en/industries)

- [About](https://quartz-solutions.net/en/about) — team, mission, history.
- [Work / Portfolio](https://quartz-solutions.net/en/portfolio) — case studies with measured outcomes.
- [Contact](https://quartz-solutions.net/en/contact) — 48-hour written response from a principal engineer.

## Languages
Quartz Solutions ships fully bilingual (English / Arabic) with
`<html lang>` + `hreflang` alternates on every page.
- English: https://quartz-solutions.net/en
- العربية: https://quartz-solutions.net/ar
